untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise Dark Cloud Cover pattern identification with directional context (up/down market and up/down breakout combinations) and performance statistics tied to specific candle height and shadow thresholds (3.80%-5.01% median candle height, upper/lower shadow ratios). The allowed indicators lack explicit breakout detection, multi-regime classification (UP_MARKET/DOWN_MARKET vs TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN), and the ability to compare current candle properties against prior period breakout prices. Pattern requires multi-candle analysis with breakout price reference not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using body_pct and upper_wick as proxies for Dark Cloud Cover (small body, large upper shadow), but true signal requires: (1) market regime classification beyond allowed regimes, (2) breakout price tracking, (3) multi-candle sequential logic, (4) conditional performance rules based on 4 market conditions. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector or providing breakout_price and market_regime as inputs.
